title: The Most Expensive Coffee
content: During a visit to a famous tourist district, Emma ordered a coffee without checking the menu price first. Only after receiving the bill did she realize it was the most expensive coffee she had ever purchased. At first, she was shocked by the cost. However, the café overlooked a beautiful square filled with musicians, artists, and historic architecture. She spent more than an hour relaxing there and observing daily life around her. Looking back, Emma considered the experience amusing rather than frustrating. Sometimes travel memories came from unexpected mistakes.
